TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Takay, title = Takay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takay} }

S.FORM: == Takay == u sulit nu Hulam ťĀĒŤďčťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Takay. u kasalumaluma' nu Takay sa, 162 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 391 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 79 ku tademaw, pakalatu 20%. u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 312 ku tademaw, pakalatu 80%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 16%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, zumazuma 1%. Pangcah a cidekay u cacay a cidekay nu Taywan Yincumincu. katuud mueneng i Kalingku-Pusun a bukebukelalan atu sawaliyan, caay katuud mueneng i Pingtung Mutan siang atu Manco siang. u sausi nu tademaw sa maka 20 a mang. u sakatuuday a cidekay. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek midimut. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen . u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin
S.PHON: == takaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu takaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu takaj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, zumazuma *%. paŇč ¶ańß a ¶id…ôkaj u ¶a ¶aj a ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u. katuud mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku-pusun a buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan atu sawar~…ĺijan, ¶aaj katuud mu…ôn…ôŇč i piŇčtuŇč mutan siaŇč atu man ¶o siaŇč. u sausi nu tad…ômaw sa maka ** a maŇč. u sakatuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk midimut. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin
S.FORM: == Takay == u sulit nu Hulam ťĀĒŤďčťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Takay. u kasalumaluma' nu Takay sa, 162 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 391 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 79 ku tademaw, pakalatu 20%. u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 312 ku tademaw, pakalatu 80%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 16%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 2%, Tayan(Tayal) 2%, zumazuma 1%. Pangcah a cidekay u cacay a cidekay nu Taywan Yincumincu. katuud mueneng i Kalingku-Pusun a bukebukelalan atu sawaliyan, caay katuud mueneng i Pingtung Mutan siang atu Manco siang. u sausi nu tademaw sa maka 20 a mang. u sakatuuday a cidekay. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek midimut. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen . u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin
S.PHON: == takaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu takaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu takaj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, juwatan(bunun) *%, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) *%, zumazuma *%. paŇč ¶ańß a ¶id…ôkaj u ¶a ¶aj a ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin ¶u. katuud mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺiŇčku-pusun a buk…ôbuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan atu sawar~…ĺijan, ¶aaj katuud mu…ôn…ôŇč i piŇčtuŇč mutan siaŇč atu man ¶o siaŇč. u sausi nu tad…ômaw sa maka ** a maŇč. u sakatuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk midimut. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn . u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin
